test.name: Scenario1: Users - Get user list - Without pagination parameters (default)

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=get_user_session, url=https://reqres.in, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://reqres.in/api/users path_url=/api/users headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.31.0', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8', 'x-api-key': 'reqres-free-v1'} body=None

C:\Users\kamineko\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python310\lib\site-packages\urllib3\connectionpool.py:1045: InsecureRequestWarning: Unverified HTTPS request is being made to host 'reqres.in'. Adding certificate verification is strongly advised. See: https://urllib3.readthedocs.io/en/1.26.x/advanced-usage.html#ssl-warnings warnings.warn(
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.arg: msg=Failed to get user list. Expected status code ${200}, but got ${response.status_code}. Response: ${response.text}
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.
